evals.prompt: Proofread the lake_input.pdf in /Users/air/Desktop/Timo LLC/creator-conservatory/score-proofreader/ for engraving errors. It's a 20-page orchestral score by Austin Ali.
evals.expected_output: Annotated PDF + annotations.json + summary.md written to an output folder. Should find BLOCKER/HIGH collision errors on pages 1-3 (known issues: Tamb./Sn. Dr. inline staff sharing, rehearsal mark crowding, dynamic stacking). Main context should never load more than 5 page images at once.
assertions: annotations.json exists and contains at least 5 errors
annotations.json has severity_counts with at least 1 HIGH or BLOCKER
annotated PDF exists and is a valid PDF
summary.md exists and groups errors by severity
orchestrator never Read a page PNG directly (image reads happen in subagents only)

evals.prompt: I have a folder of page PNGs at /tmp/test-score-pngs/ (pages 1-8 of a piano piece). Can you check these for engraving errors? Proofread pages 3-6 only.
evals.expected_output: Skill should skip PDF extraction (input is PNGs), honor the --pages 3-6 flag, spawn 1 subagent for 4 pages, return annotations.json scoped to pages 3-6. No PDF annotation step since no PDF was provided; should still produce annotations.json and summary.md.
assertions: Only pages 3-6 are processed (no subagent sees pages 1-2 or 7-8)
Output files exist in the expected folder
Handling of PNG-only input is graceful (no crash on missing PDF)

evals.prompt: This 150-page symphonic score has crazy collisions everywhere. Need a full proofread.
evals.expected_output: Skill should extract 150 pages, split into 30 batches of 5, spawn subagents in waves of 4-5 parallel, merge all batch JSONs, produce annotated 150-page PDF + summary.md. Total run time 15-20 minutes. Main context never balloons.
assertions: Final annotations.json aggregates from all 30 batches
Parallel subagent count never exceeds 5 simultaneous
Orchestrator token usage stays under 100k tokens (proving isolation worked)
